_about: planwright worker-settings profile (REQ-F1.8, D-38). A Claude Code settings fragment a /orchestrate worker (background subagent or headless tmux/cron worker) runs under so the ROUTINE /execute-task toolset is pre-approved and the autonomy loop does not stall on permission prompts. planwright never edits settings.json itself (REQ-I1.2): merge this into the worker's settings (or reference it) the same way hook wiring is a manual step. SECURITY: this is a permissions allowlist and needs human sign-off before use; the deny block encodes planwright's hard invariants (never merge / force-push / amend / squash / rebase) as guardrails, but review the allow list against your repo's risk posture first.
